source.description: THIS VERSION REQUIRES THE CLOUD INTEGRATION SERVICE. UiPath Integration Service based automation activities for Act! 365. These activities allow you to execute create, retrieve, update, delete and invoke operations on Act! 365 objects.
source.tags: UiPathActivities act 365 crm customer integration service sales connector catalog

activities.description: Lists a page of records in Act! 365.
Lists all the records of an object in Act! 365.
List all the campaigns in Act! 365.
List all the contacts in Act! 365.
Updates a contact record in Act! 365.
List all the Groups in Act! 365.
Replaces a Group record in Act! 365.
List all the Interactions in Act! 365.
Replace an Interaction record in Act! 365.
List all the Opportunities in Act! 365.
Updates a basic Opportunity record in Act! 365.
Get the Url Key of the Calendar.
